summary: P0 Critical Bug Fix Verified: Payment balance credit issue has been successfully fixed. All 14 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend PaymentResult page correctly shows 'Payment Not Completed' for pending/cancelled payments and balance remains unchanged.
critical_code_review_comments: ✅ /api/admin/sync-payments endpoint correctly REMOVED - was auto-confirming all pending payments
✅ /api/balance endpoint only expires old pending payments (>30 min), does NOT auto-confirm
✅ /api/admin/expire-pending-payments marks payments as 'expired' WITHOUT adding balance
✅ /api/payments/callback is the ONLY endpoint that credits balance (on Epoint success callback)
✅ PaymentResult.jsx does NOT trust URL parameters - always checks backend API for status
✅ PaymentResult.jsx correctly shows 'Ödəniş Tamamlanmadı' for pending payments
seed_data_creation: Multiple test payments created during testing (all expired/cleaned up)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Payment bug fix has been verified. Key tests: 1) Create payment -> balance unchanged, 2) Call /api/balance -> no auto-confirm, 3) /api/admin/sync-payments returns 404, 4) /api/admin/expire-pending-payments expires without crediting, 5) PaymentResult page shows correct pending status

verified_bug_fixes.payment_creation_no_balance_change: ✅ VERIFIED - Creating payment does NOT affect balance
verified_bug_fixes.balance_endpoint_no_auto_confirm: ✅ VERIFIED - /api/balance does NOT auto-confirm pending payments
verified_bug_fixes.callback_only_credits: ✅ VERIFIED - Only /api/payments/callback can credit balance (requires valid Epoint signature)
verified_bug_fixes.frontend_no_url_trust: ✅ VERIFIED - PaymentResult.jsx checks backend API, not URL params
verified_bug_fixes.frontend_shows_pending: ✅ VERIFIED - Shows 'Ödəniş Tamamlanmadı' for pending payments

test_scenarios_executed: Create multiple payments and expire them - balance unchanged
Navigate to /result page - shows 'Payment Not Completed'
Test payment callback rejects invalid signatures
Test all payment endpoints require authentication
